global_description: A small, slender songbird with a distinctive black and yellow coloration. It features a bright yellow underbelly and throat, contrasted by a black mask and streaked back. The wings are dark with white wing bars, and the tail is black with white patches.

part_details.underbelly: Bright yellow, smooth texture, extending from throat to tail.
part_details.face: Black mask covering eyes and forehead, contrasting sharply with yellow throat.
part_details.wings: Dark with prominent white bars, medium length.
part_details.back: Black with subtle streaks, blending into wing coloration.
part_details.tail: Short, black with distinct white patches on outer edges.

spatial_relations: The black mask covers the face, surrounding the eyes.
The white wing bars run horizontally across the dark wings.
The yellow underbelly extends from the throat to the tail.
